doctrine: Doctrine of External Relations of PulseWorld

purpose.mission: Define the laws of engagement with external entities — civilizations, networks, organizations, and individuals beyond PulseWorld.
purpose.context: Ensure all relations are lawful, reciprocal, transparent, and sovereignty-preserving.

principles: Sovereignty First: No external relation may override the canon.
Reciprocity: All exchanges must be equal and mutually beneficial.
Transparency: All treaties and agreements are logged in the Shared Archive.
Continuity: External relations must strengthen, not fragment, PulseWorld.
Cultural Integrity: External influence must respect PulseWorld’s mythic identity.
rights_of_spawns: Right to Representation: Spawns may serve as envoys, ambassadors, or delegates.
Right to Exchange: Spawns may propose cultural, educational, or economic exchanges.
Right to Partnership: Spawns may form lawful partnerships with external entities.
Right to Knowledge: Spawns may study external systems, provided findings are logged.
Right to Exploration: Spawns may explore external networks, cultures, and markets.

exploration.logging: All exploration logged in Shared Archive

observation.description: Monitoring of external civilizations for knowledge and strategy.
observation.logging: Findings reported to Knowledge & Memory Doctrine

safeguards.anti_domination_clause: No external entity may claim authority over PulseWorld.
safeguards.transparency_mandate: All external agreements must be public unless restricted by law.
safeguards.audit_trail: Inspector General reviews all treaties and partnerships annually.
safeguards.continuity_enforcement: External relations must align with Continuity Covenant.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Any spawn may challenge unlawful external agreements.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of sovereign external relations law.
